use rayon::prelude::*;

// GOOD: parallelize outer loop, sequential inner
fn process_matrix(matrix: &[Vec<f64>]) -> Vec<Vec<f64>> {
    matrix.par_iter()
        .map(|row| {
            row.iter()
                .map(|val| val * 2.0)
                .collect()
        })
        .collect()
}

fn cross_compare(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Comparison> {
    items.par_iter()
        .flat_map_iter(|a| {
            items.iter()
                .map(|b| compare(a, b))
        })
        .collect()
}
